ItacPersonItem.Notes: He published poems under the nickname he had in the Selvaggi Academy, see Orlandi Notizie degli scrittori bolognesi 1714 p.143. Motto and emblem are explained in Memorie ritratti imprese degli accademici Gelati, p. 277v. Capponi was part of the Instabili Academy, founded by his uncle Pellegrino, where Giovanni`s emblem was a wool-winder, the motto `Fermo nel piede son se ben m`aggiro`. Giovanni founded the Academia dei Selvaggi in the house of Filippo Certani where his emblem was a bird moving his wings in order to get out of the nest, with the motto `Manca la forza`, and his nickname was Animoso. He played a part in devising the tournament `Amore prigioniero in Delo` (1628), organised by Accademici Torbidi. On Capponi`s biography, see Gian Luigi Betti, `Giovanni Capponi, filosofo, astrologo e politico del Seicento`, in Studi secenteschi (1986)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
